description:
Parent epic: V3 E1: Simplified DSL foundation

Source task 1/13 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Implement `agent :id do ... end` as the primary entrypoint.

Epic closure criteria:
- the simplified DSL is the only documented DSL
- pre-V3 DSL shapes are removed
- DSL tests cover success, failure, and error-message quality

comments.text: Implemented the V3 primary agent entrypoint as a top-level Spark entity: agent :id do ... end. Moved model/instructions/character/context/output into the agent contract for the compiler path, migrated deterministic fixtures/tests to the new shape, and added a compile-time validation test for the new entrypoint. Verification: mix format --check-formatted, mix compile --warnings-as-errors, mix test.

title: E1: Implement agent :id do ... end as the primary entrypoint
